subject: pricing issue for 5/00 production - duke energy

emails.subject: Pricing Issue for 5/00 production - Duke Energy
emails.subject_base: Pricing Issue for 5/00 production - Duke Energy
emails.body: You probably haven't had time to look at the Duke Energy price. When you get a chance could you please let me know what the correct price is for May 2000 production. Forwarded by Elizabeth L Hernandez/HOU/ECT on 09/01/2000 07:48 AM From: Stephanie Gomes 08/30/2000 08:48 AM

emails.subject: Re: Pricing Issue for 5/00 production - Duke Energy
emails.subject_base: Pricing Issue for 5/00 production - Duke Energy
emails.body: Re: Pricing Issue for 5/00 production Duke Energy I corrected the deal. The price should be Waha Index +.01. D Elizabeth L Hernandez 09/01/2000 07:49 AM
